title: Vietnam Spa Lead Scraper with Emails Input

keyword.title: Keyword
keyword.description: Search keyword for spas and beauty clinics.

location.title: Location
location.description: City, district, or area in Vietnam, for example Ho Chi Minh, Da Nang, Hanoi, or Nha Trang.

maxResults.title: Max results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of Google Maps results to scrape.

extractEmails.title: Extract emails
extractEmails.description: Whether to extract email addresses from business websites.

batchSize.title: Batch size
batchSize.description: Number of business detail pages processed in parallel.

useApifyProxy.title: Use Apify Proxy
useApifyProxy.description: Whether to use Apify Proxy for browser requests.
